name: Roundabout (to R and L)
preceding_figure_names: Contra Bota Fogos, Foot Change 5: Promenade Position to Right Contra Position, Maypole, Reverse Basic Movement, Round About, Side Basic Movement, Traveling Bota Fogos Forward
following_figure_names: Contra Bota Fogos (Roundabout to R followed by LF Contra Bota Fogos, Roundabout to L followed by RF Contra Bota Fogos), Round About (Roundabout to R followed by Roundabout to L, Roundabout to L followed by Roundabout to R)
notes: This figure may be repeated. Man and Lady circle around an imaginary spot between them, keeping the shoulders parallel.

steps.action: Circular Volta in R Contra Position, commence with RF, 7/8 to R over steps 1-5
LF to side without weight, 3/8 to R over steps 6-7, I/E of T (Pressure)
Take minimal weight to LF and replace weight to RF in L Contra Position
Circular Volta in L Contra Position, commence with RF, 7/8 to R over steps 1-5
RF to side without weight, 3/8 to R over steps 6-7, I/E of T (Pressure)
Take minimal weight to RF and replace weight to LF in R Contra Position
